title: Traditional British Nectarine Crumble
description: A classic dessert recipe featuring juicy nectarines topped with a crunchy oat and butter crumble. Perfect for warm weather and summer gatherings.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine sliced nectarines, granulated sugar, and a pinch of salt. Let it sit for about 15 minutes to allow the fruit to release its juice.

In a separate bowl, mix together flour, baking powder, and a pinch of sugar. Add in cold butter and use your fingers or a pastry blender to work it into the dry ingredients until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Add in oats and stir until they're evenly distributed throughout the crumb mixture.
Transfer the nectarine mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish. Top with the crumb mixture, spreading it out evenly.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is tender and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving. Enjoy warm or at room temperature.
